results.rendered_html:
avyathi (3. a + vya˚)
1〉 adj. nicht wankend, sicher schreitend, unverzagt: pro|aḥ samudramavyathirjaganvān  ṚV. 1,117,15 . (rayiṃ) suparṇo avyathirbharat 9,48,3 . Beiw. der Rosse der Aśvin (vgl.  NAIGH. 1,14 ): (bhujyum) udūhathurarṇaso asridhānaiḥ . patatribhiramairavyathibhiḥ 7,69,8 . bhujyuṃ yābhiravyathibhirjijinvathuḥ 1,112,6 .
— 2〉 f. sicherer Gang, Unverzagtheit: tadavyathī jarimāṇastaranti  ṚV. 10,27,21 . yo vediṣṭho avyathiṣvaśvāvantaṃ jaritṛbhyaḥ (vājam) ?8,2,24 . 10,31,10 .  SV. II, 2,2,3,3  (Var. zu  ṚV. 9,48,3 ).

results.rendered_html:
avyathi a. Ved. [vyath-in, na. ta.] Not tremulous or tottering (in steps), steady, sure-footed, undaunted; epithet of the horses of the Aśvins.
— thiḥ f.
1 A firm step.
2 Undauntedness.
